title: [中文] 行业 archetype —— 传统纵向整合的瑞士私人银行

description.en: The traditional vertically-integrated Swiss private bank that did everything in-house — relationship management, financial-product R&D, and transaction infrastructure all under one roof.
description.zh: 传统的纵向整合瑞士私人银行 —— 客户关系管理、金融产品研发、交易基础设施全部内部完成,所有业务在一个屋檐下。
